notes: Second diagnostic-driven clean split for motions/Video1.
Compared with video1_clean_manifest.json, this version removes 10_penalty1 entirely because the clean-local CVAE still finds large OOD errors in both prestrike and follow.
Frame ranges use [start, end) indices. Default range matching is overlap.

exclude_motions.reason: After v1 filtering, this motion remains dominant OOD source in prestrike and follow.

exclude_ranges.reason: Follow-through OOD begins before the v1 cut; extend the removed range earlier.
Initial approach OOD spike in the first windows.
